inputs.label: Byte Count
inputs.businessContext: Total number of bytes to be encoded

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of bytes to be encoded

inputs.label: ASCII Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that are ASCII (1 byte each)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of characters that are ASCII (1 byte each)
businessContext_i18n.tr: ASCII olan karakterlerin yüzdesi (her biri 1 bayt)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zeichen, die ASCII sind (1 Byte pro Zeichen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de caractères ASCII (1 octet chacun)

inputs.label: 2-Byte Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that require 2 bytes (e.g., Latin extended)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of characters that require 2 bytes (e.g., Latin extended)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 2 bayt gerektiren karakterlerin yüzdesi (örn. genişletilmiş Latin)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zeichen, die 2 Bytes benötigen (z. B. erweitertes Latein)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de caractères nécessitant 2 octets (ex. latin étendu)

inputs.label: 3-Byte Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that require 3 bytes (e.g., CJK)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of characters that require 3 bytes (e.g., CJK)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zeichen, die 3 Bytes benötigen (z. B. CJK)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de caractères nécessitant 3 octets (ex. CJK)

inputs.label: 4-Byte Character Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of characters that require 4 bytes (e.g., emoji)

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of characters that require 4 bytes (e.g., emoji)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Zeichen, die 4 Bytes benötigen (z. B. Emoji)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de caractères nécessitant 4 octets (ex. emoji)

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Additional overhead for BOM or metadata

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional overhead for BOM or metadata
businessContext_i18n.tr: BOM veya meta veri için ek yük
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Overhead für BOM oder Metadaten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surcharge supplémentaire pour BOM ou métadonnées

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
